## About us
Dahabshil Bank International (DBI) is fully fledged sharia bank licensed by both Central Banks of Somalia and Somaliland.
## Who We Are
Dahabshil bank international is the first fully fledged sharia banking to be established in Somaliland. As Dahabshil Bank International is integral, trustworthy, and profitable bank that provides accessible and affordable sharia compliant financial solutions to their customers.
Dahabshil bank is widely contacted to all types of nations internationally and locally from very important well-known businesspeople to governance, international embassies, International and local NGOs, and their local customer as it provides efficient banking services with friendly welcoming trustworthy environment.
Dahabshil bank is expanding to more international standards which is benefit for the clients leading to variety of banking services and features. As the bank is connected to various sections of the market such businesses companies what is best then providing easier banking access.
The bank was launched in 2012 and the primary interest is in East Africa, Gulf Region, Western Europe and North America. Our bank collaborates with first-rate after-sales service, the highest ethical standards of Sharia and the latest automation so as to bring cost-effective goods and services to our customer.
DBI is integral , trustworthy and profitable. Our dedicated team and networks are committed to provide accessible and affordable sharia compliant financial solutions to our customers. Since inception, the bank displayed magnificent growth in terms of balance sheet size and system and the ever-increasing demand for our products is a testament to our progress.
## Our Philosophy
Dahabshil Bank was forecasted to fill a gap in the Islamic financial services market in Somaliland this is because the country has few banks. Our idea is to bring forth accessible and affordable modes of Islamic finance to merchants and potential executives to start and grow their business.
### Our Vision
To be the preferred financial services provider contributing to the economic prosperity of the people of the region and beyond.
### Our Mission
To offer inclusive customer-oriented financial services utilizing our extensive local market knowledge, financial expertise, appropriate technology, and relationships, thus contributing to the economic prosperity of our clients and stakeholders.
### Apply online
If you do not have an existing account with Dahabshil Bank, you can apply online through our secure E-banking.
[Apply now](https://www.dahabpay.com/Authentication/Login)
Access and manage your account with us easier now with our E-banking features
[Sign in to E-banking](https://www.dahabpay.com/Authentication/Login)
